ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Index, Currency Pair, Future) */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* Currency pair (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tick_data" (
  "tick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tick data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "tick_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tick data */,
  "tick_value" REAL /* Value of the tick data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tick data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tick data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tick_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD, ROC) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the technical indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technical indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technical indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was placed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price alert, trend alert) */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert (e.g., price > 100) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, trade history) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., theme, notification frequency) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument (if applicable) */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "news_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "instrument_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of instrument IDs in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade (if applicable) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., ROI, PnL) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade signal */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "signal_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value of the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_signals_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade history entry */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sentiment entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "sentiment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market sentiment */,
  "sentiment_value" REAL /* Value of the market sentiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market sentiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market sentiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "instrument_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first financial instrument */,
  "instrument_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second financial instrument */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Value of the correlation between the two instruments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the correlation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_correlations_instrument_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id2") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_correlations_instrument_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id1") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "volatility_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the volatility data */,
  "volatility_value" REAL /* Value of the volatility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the volatility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the volatility was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_volatility_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_liquidity" (
  "liquidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "liquidity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the liquidity data */,
  "liquidity_value" REAL /* Value of the liquidity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the liquidity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the liquidity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liquidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_liquidity_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
